terms.definition: Chinese extortion gangs, historically secret societies
terms.context: Chinese organized crime groups in North America
terms.etymology: From Chinese 堂 (táng) meaning 'hall' or 'meeting place'
terms.historicalNote: Dating back to 19th century Chinese immigrant communities

terms.definition: Chinese organized crime syndicates, equivalent to mafia
terms.etymology: Named for triangular symbol representing heaven, earth, and humanity
terms.historicalNote: Originated as resistance groups against Qing Dynasty

terms.definition: Generic term for any Asian gang member
terms.context: Collective reference to Asian organized crime affiliates

terms.definition: Motorcycle club patch earned for oral sex act on Asian woman
terms.context: MC gang patch system indicating specific acts
terms.note: Part of outlaw motorcycle club merit badge system
